description: Tunde Olanrewaju CBE is a Senior Partner with McKinsey and Company based in the London office, and Managing Partner for Europe, leading the firm’s practice across 23 countries. He is also a member of the firm’s global leadership team, the Enablement Team. He was previously the firm’s Global Chief Technology Officer and helped create McKinsey Digital, building out design, software engineering, analytics and AI capabilities for clients. He works across a range of sectors on strategy, operations, organisation and AI /Digital transformation. Tunde is a trustee of Oxfam GB , an independent member of Imperial College Council, and on the board of Innovate UK. He was made a Commander of the Order of the British Empire ( CBE ) in the King’s Birthday Honours 2025 for services to Business.

details.body:
Tunde Olanrewaju CBE is a Senior Partner with McKinsey and Company based in the London office, and Managing Partner for Europe, leading the firm’s practice across 23 countries. He is also a member of the firm’s global leadership team, the Enablement Team.

He was previously the firm’s Global Chief Technology Officer and helped create McKinsey Digital, building out design, software engineering, analytics and AI capabilities for clients. He works across a range of sectors on strategy, operations, organisation and AI/Digital transformation.

Tunde is a trustee of Oxfam GB, an independent member of Imperial College Council, and on the board of Innovate UK. He was made a Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE) in the King’s Birthday Honours 2025 for services to Business.

Tunde Olanrewaju CBE is a Senior Partner with McKinsey and Company based in the London office, and Managing Partner for Europe, leading the firm’s practice across 23 countries. He is also a member of the firm’s global leadership team, the Enablement Team.

He was previously the firm’s Global Chief Technology Officer and helped create McKinsey Digital, building out design, software engineering, analytics and AI capabilities for clients. He works across a range of sectors on strategy, operations, organisation and AI/Digital transformation.

Tunde is a trustee of Oxfam GB, an independent member of Imperial College Council, and on the board of Innovate UK. He was made a Commander of the Order of the British Empire (CBE) in the King’s Birthday Honours 2025 for services to Business.

Members of the Industrial Strategy Advisory Council (ISAC) contribute to the development and long-term delivery of HM Government’s industrial strategy. They work with the ISAC chair and other ISAC members to produce independent, evidence-based recommendations that directly inform government policy.

role_appointments.title: Tunde Olanrewaju - Industrial Strategy Advisory Council member

title: Tunde Olanrewaju CBE
